channel.title: Shokofin on Shoko
channel.description: Recent content in Shokofin on Shoko

item.title: Shoko 2021 Project Update
item.description: It’s no secret our team is working on multiple projects under the Shoko umbrella. Some of them we’ve talked about publicly, either on this website, on Discord, and on other platforms, and some we’ve only discussed internall amongst the team. So with it being a new year, we thought it would be best to outline the current status on all of our projects, as well as talk about some new ones in development.
